description_long: This hammer features a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a dark brown finish, providing a comfortable and secure grip. The head is made of metallic material, with a broad, wedge-shaped striking face on one side and a pointed, chisel-like end on the other, resembling a tomahawk or hatchet style rather than a traditional hammer. The transition between the handle and the head is reinforced, suggesting durability for heavy-duty tasks. The metallic head has a matte gray appearance, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible signs of wear, damage, or additional attachments. The hammer's proportions and materials make it suitable for use in urban environments such as construction sites, garages, or workshops.
description: A sturdy hammer with a curved wooden handle and a matte gray, wedge-shaped metal head, resembling a tomahawk or hatchet. The design is utilitarian and shows no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed end of the metallic head and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the broad, wedge-shaped striking face and the pronounced curve of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the metallic head and the full length of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the other profile of the wedge-shaped head and the ergonomic curve of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth, ergonomic shape and dark brown finish.
attribute_head_type: Wedge-shaped metal head with a broad striking face and a pointed, chisel-like end, resembling a tomahawk or hatchet.
